findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "describe_skin_types" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Returns the six Fitzpatrick skin types with sun-reactivity behavior and descriptive ancestry hints. Call this when the user's skin type is unknown so you can pi…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
